text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter... Murmur, murmur...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Hanshin Juvenile Fillies, and
the audience is far more worked up than usual for
this G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how this race is going to play out! Man, I
can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
A lot of the Umamusume in this race are aiming
for the Triple Tiara, and we've got a seriously
good lineup of amazing contenders this year.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
A lot of times, whoever wins this ends up being
the star of their classic year! This is one race
we've gotta keep our eye on!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wow... Everyone is so excited.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I get to be a part of this... I'm sure
even my parents are surprised how big the crowd
is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm overwhelmed by how high expectations are
for this G1 race. Just thinking about how Nishino
Flower will be running in this supercharged
environment makes me sick with nerves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stress about whether she's managed to shake off
all her fatigue ahead of today. If she hasn't, and
she ends up getting injured...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Wh-why don't we head to the waiting room?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hm? Okay!

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Coming through! Come on, keep it
moving!

text_block_list.name: Racecourse Staff B
text_block_list.text: R-right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not just the spectators. The entire racecourse
seems to quiver with nervous anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Everyone looks so busy... I hope everything's
okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Luckily, Nishino Flower seems completely
unaffected. Just then...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Racer A
text_block_list.text:
Keep a close eye on me, Trainer. I've finally made
it to this stage, and I intend to win no matter
what!

text_block_list.name: Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Don't get too worked up out there. You're the
strongest Umamusume I've worked with, and I
know you'll be fine. You believe in me, right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Racer A
text_block_list.text: I do! See you in a bit!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
choice_data_list: (If only I had that much experience...)
(If only I had that much experience...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In their junior year, all Umamusume have about
the same amount of experience. Therefore, it's
their trainer's experience that can make all the
difference.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If only I had met her when I had more experience
as a trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Why did I have to become race-ready so early?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah, well, um...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is so much more confident than me.
They're so awesome and cool.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Compared to them, I'm still just a kid, aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm smaller and weaker than everyone else... I just
don't think I have the confidence to run with
them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The most important Umamusume in the world to
me is standing here, anxious and uneasy. Even if I
were an experienced trainer, my failure to notice
her anxiety would be a gross oversight.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've grown and improved so much because of you,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower recognizes my efforts, and the
person who knows better than anyone how hard
she works and how skilled she is... is me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: You have a special sparkle in you.
You have a special sparkle in you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that she isn't as physically developed as
other racers, but that's because she skipped a few
grades and enrolled in Tracen Academy early.
Not just anyone can do that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That alone is proof that she's got more than
enough to overcome any disadvantage!
choice_data_list: You can do it. I believe in you!
You can do it. I believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... That's right. You do.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Hearing that is really heartening. I...
feel a lot better.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I'm going to win today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: And I'm going to do it for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You can do it. I believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You can do it. I believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer's voice was trembling... But that's no
surprise.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(This is Trainer's first G1 race too... I guess we're
both nervous.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (But here I am, only thinking about myself...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Why does it have to be now? I wish I'd become
race-ready after I'd grown bigger and taller.
Trainer's been working so hard, but look at me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(But this isn't the time to be thinking about that. I
want Trainer to feel more confident. That's why I
chose to run today! That's why...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I want to win.
